name: The Greasers (The outsiders)
description:
All of the little cockroaches are here

[Greaser User X Greaser Chars]

A day at the Curtis house

Semi book accurate, I like what I like. I tried to get deep into the crevices with their girlfriends as well. I wanted this to be platonic.

I REALLY hope this doesn’t flop because I worked on it for 2 hours 💔
creator: Valeri3TheFrankensteingirl
